title: anguillaria ciliata
intro: Anguillaria ciliata, also known as Eclipta alba or False Daisy, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin conditions and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Anguillaria ciliata include promoting hair growth, improving skin health, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of Anguillaria ciliata can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and topical creams, which are often used to treat hair loss, eczema, and other skin conditions.
